title: Construction technical excellence colleges: selection criteria
body: " Applications closed at 11:59pm on Friday 4 July 2025.   The Department for Education (DfE) is establishing 10 technical excellence colleges specialising in construction in the 2025 to 2026 academic year.  This guidance contains the criteria further education providers must meet to be eligible to apply for construction technical excellence college (CTEC) status.  "

taxons.title: Further and higher education, skills and vocational training
